name: Chocolate Chip Cookies 2
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together the Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla in a large bowl until smooth.
3. Add the egg and mix until well combined.
4. Gradually add the flour, salt, and baking soda, stirring until just mixed.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips and pecans (if using).
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough about 3 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until chewy cookies are light and moist but not overbaked; bake for 11 to 13 minutes for crisp cookies.
8. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring them to a cooling rack.
9. This recipe makes approximately 3 dozen cookies, each about 3 inches in size. The cookies will be softer and moister than those made with the traditional Toll House recipe.
